affected_services.details: Service 'up' metric dropped to 0.0 (min=0.0, avg=0.70647) at 16:14:51 UTC. HTTP 5xx error rate spiked to 3.02752 errors/s (2.0×avg) at 16:53:06 UTC. HTTP response latency spiked to 0.03638s (4.0×avg) at 16:57:06 UTC. No successful startup logs; 629 'ECONNREFUSED 172.18.0.3:80' errors and 75 'npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script' errors.
2,930 DNS lookup timeouts for 'front-end' (e.g., 'dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: read udp 127.0.0.1:59534->127.0.0.11:53: i/o timeout' at 16:24:07 UTC).
HTTP latency spiked to 908ms (traceID: ea32b88d7d3e18d4c82193dff9da3263) for GET /metrics at 16:59:06 UTC. CPU throttling spiked to 0.21594 (22.8×avg) at the same time.
CPU usage spiked to 0.93588 cores (29.5×avg) at 16:28:21 UTC. Go GC rate spiked to 4.40936 (40.7×avg) at the same time.

root_cause.summary: The front-end service failed to start due to a configuration error (port conflict or missing dependencies), causing DNS resolution failures in edge-router and cascading unavailability.

causal_chain.event: Service 'up' metric dropped to 0, indicating the service failed to start. No successful startup logs were recorded.
causal_chain.evidence: __name__=up, instance=front-end:8079, job=frontend: min=0.0, avg=0.70647, max=1.0 (peak at 16:14:51 UTC, 201 pts)

causal_chain.event: Repeated 'ECONNREFUSED 172.18.0.3:80' errors and 'npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script' errors confirmed the service never bound to port 80.
causal_chain.evidence:
[ERROR ×629] Error with log in: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 172.18.0.3:80
[ERROR ×75] npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script 'node server.js'.

causal_chain.event: DNS lookup timeouts for 'front-end' began, as the service was unresolvable due to its unavailability.
causal_chain.evidence: [ERROR ×45] time="2026-05-07T16:24:07Z" level=warning msg="Error forwarding to http://front-end:8079, err: dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: read udp 127.0.0.1:59534->127.0.0.11:53: i/o timeout"

causal_chain.event: HTTP 5xx error rate spiked to 3.02752 errors/s as downstream services failed to handle the unavailability of front-end.
causal_chain.evidence: job=frontend, status_code=500: min=0.0, avg=1.51876, max=3.02752 (peak at 16:53:06 UTC, 106 pts)

contributing_factors: Port conflict or misconfiguration in front-end (failed to bind to 172.18.0.3:80).
Missing dependencies or corrupted node_modules (npm startup failures).
Edge-router DNS resolution failures amplified the outage by preventing traffic routing.
No traces or metrics for front-end confirmed its unavailability during the anomaly window.

evidence.description:
[ERROR ×629] Error with log in: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 172.18.0.3:80 (front-end)
[ERROR ×75] npm ERR! Failed at the microservices-demo-front-end@0.0.1 start script 'node server.js' (front-end)
[ERROR ×45] time="2026-05-07T16:24:07Z" level=warning msg="Error forwarding to http://front-end:8079, err: dial tcp: lookup front-end on 127.0.0.11:53: i/o timeout" (edge-router)

__name__=up, instance=front-end:8079, job=frontend: min=0.0, avg=0.70647, max=1.0 (peak at 16:14:51 UTC, 201 pts)
job=frontend, status_code=500: min=0.0, avg=1.51876, max=3.02752 (peak at 16:53:06 UTC, 106 pts)
job=frontend: min=0.00475, avg=0.00907, max=0.03638 (peak at 16:57:06 UTC, 100 pts)
No traces for 'front-end' during the anomaly window. Slow traces for 'orders' (traceID: ea32b88d7d3e18d4c82193dff9da3263, 908ms) confirm backend latency but no direct link to front-end failures.

impact: End-users were unable to access the application frontend, resulting in a complete outage of the user interface. Downstream services (e.g., orders, carts) experienced elevated latency due to failed dependencies, but no direct user-facing impact was observed beyond the frontend unavailability.
